arts.ttl: Ancelotti defends Real's Ballon d'Or snub
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti maintains his side were right to boycott last year's Ballon d'Or after Vinicius Jr was beaten to the award by Manchester City's Rodri.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti on Real Madrid Ballon d’Or snub: ‘Vini was the winner’
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti confirms that Real Madrid snubbed the Ballon d’Or ceremony in October because they...

arts.ttl: Man City vs Real Madrid Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Manchester City and Real Madrid is the blockbuster tie of the Champions League playoffs and the pair lock horns at the Etihad Stadium for their first leg meeting tonight. Ahead of the clash, we&rsquo...

arts.ttl: Steve McManaman claims Kylian Mbappe MUST deliver against Man City if Real Madrid star wants to win Ballon d'Or next year
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE INTERVIEW: Steve McManaman believes Kylian Mbappe needs to propel Real Madrid to victory over Manchester City in their Champions League knockout play-off.

arts.ttl: PSG make contact with Vinícius Jr., who could leave Real Madrid at the end of the season
arts.sum: Vinícius Jr (24) is the subject of an approach from Paris Saint-Germain, Sacha Tavolieri understands, with the Brazilian’s future at Real Madrid currently uncertain. The winger’s contract with Los Blancos currently runs until the…

arts.ttl: Man City and Real Madrid got what they wanted but now face new Champions League playoff problem
arts.sum: The world is not enough for the two superpowers, who have dominated European football for the past half-decade but still insist on trying to bend everything to their will via legal challenges

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: Whoever wins our play-off with City will win Champions League
arts.sum: Real Madrid boss Carlo Ancelotti has laid down a marker to their Champions League rivals by saying whoever wins their play-off tie with Manchester City will lift the trophy in May.

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham Breaks La Liga Rule in Every Real Madrid Game
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham is breaking a little-known rule in every La Liga game he plays, but he hasn't been punished for his actions yet.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star responds to WORLD RECORD Real Madrid offer
arts.sum: During Arsenal's recent trip to Dubai, a Gunners fan begged Saliba not to join Real Madrid this summer. Real Madrid have reportedly made a record-breaking move for William Saliba, and the Arsenal star defender has not ruled out a transfer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star is keen on leaving with Real Madrid named as his ‘dream’ club
arts.sum: One of Arsenal’s best players is attracting interest from Real Madrid with the player open to a move to the La Liga champions. The Gunners have challenged for the Premier League title for the last two seasons but on both occasions, they have lost out to Pep Guardiola’s Manchester City side.
